title: Bound Options
body:
# Bound Options  
This mod adds keybindings to toggle/cycle specific options, such as (but not limited to) subtitles, chat visibility, and toggle sneak.  

## Keybindings  
- Toggle Sneak  
- Toggle Sprint  
- Toggle Subtitles  
- Toggle Main Hand  
- Toggle Auto Jump  
- Cycle Chat Visibility
